name: pi-agent-harness
description: The team-architecture factory for pi — a meta-skill that turns a domain description into a pi agent team (.pi/agents), the skills they use (.pi/skills), and orchestration prompt templates (.pi/prompts), with six pre-defined team-architecture patterns (Pipeline, Fan-out/Fan-in, Expert Pool, Producer-Reviewer, Supervisor, Hierarchical Delegation). pi용 팀 아키텍처 팩토리: 도메인 한 문장을 pi 에이전트 팀과 스킬·오케스트레이션 프롬프트로 변환하는 메타 스킬.
author: robin (https://github.com/revfactory)
